🔬 Fired-Census — and the blind spot it found in its first hour

The closure gate proves a hook is wired. Nothing proved it fires. Building the thing that does exposed a 4.5-month telemetry bug.
16 → 59
ALIVE hooks, before → after the fix
(43 were never dead)
7,101
census records already on disk
nothing had ever read them
0
added hot-path cost
(the writer already existed)
28/28
dispatcher tests green
+3 new regression cases

1 The gap

validate-registry.mjs  ──▶ "is this hook WIRED?"   ✅ solved (#2887)
nobody                 ──▶ "does it actually FIRE?" ❌ blind

why it matters — #2886 was WIRED, REACHABLE, tested… and fired ZERO times
(guarded tool_name 'Task'; the matcher sends 'Agent'. 12 green tests.)
the closure gate CANNOT catch that class. Only runtime can.
🎯 Negative control — the reason to trust this 
the exact hook that started the whole session:
pretool/task/team-size-gate  →  status=NEVER  fires_total=0
closure gate says "REACHABLE ✅" · fired-census says "never ran ❌"

2 The discovery: the census was already there

run-hook.mjs has appended one record per invocation SINCE MARCH:
~/.claude/analytics/hook-timing.jsonl   7,101 records · 4.5 months
{"ts":"…","hook":"posttool/commit-nudge","duration_ms":12,"ok":true,"pid":"…"}
                                              ↑ hook id + timing only — no args, no content
The write side was never missing. Only the reader was.
run-hook.mjs diff vs main for the report: EMPTY — zero added latency.

3 🔴 What the report found in its first run

census records by event, ALL TIME:
  PostToolUse 2226 · SubagentStop 240 · PreToolUse 227 · Setup 151 …
  SessionStart 0  ·  Stop 0  ·  SessionEnd 0   ← in 4.5 months

18/20 SessionStart hooks: "never fired" — including session-registrar
and session-env-setup, which run EVERY session.

Either ~34 lifecycle hooks were silently dead (the #959 class at 3× scale) — or the instrument was lying.

4 Four hypotheses, three refuted — then the proof

❌ version skew ...... the hooks ARE in the installed 8.74.0 hooks.json
❌ async flag ........ 6 async hooks DO fire
❌ matcher-less ...... UserPromptSubmit has no matcher, all 5 fire
❌ fan-out blindness . accounted for separately (UNOBSERVABLE class)

✅ the contradiction that cracked it:
   sessions.db modified 19:07 today · session-registrar is its ONLY writer
   · census says it "never fired"
   ⇒ a hook that never fires cannot write a database. The census was wrong.

5 Root cause — one line

run-hook.mjs:466
  const sessionId = process.env.CLAUDE_SESSION_ID;
  if (!sessionId) return;   ← skips tracking entirely

CC passes session_id in the STDIN PAYLOAD on lifecycle events and does
NOT export CLAUDE_SESSION_ID → every SessionStart/Stop/SessionEnd hook
wrote no record. For 4.5 months. While working perfectly.

FIX: payload first, env second —
  const sessionId = sessionIdFromInput || process.env.CLAUDE_SESSION_ID;
🔬 Proven by negative control (the same test, both ways) 
env CLAUDE_SESSION_ID=x  → hook runs → census +1  ✅
env -u CLAUDE_SESSION_ID → hook runs → census +0  🔴  ← the bug
── after the fix ──
env -u CLAUDE_SESSION_ID → hook runs → census +1  🟢  ← same test, now passes

impact the moment it landed: ALIVE 16 → 59
43 hooks were never dead — the instrument just couldn't see them.

6 Honesty built into the report

UNOBSERVABLE — dispatcher children run in-process and never reach
  run-hook.mjs, so they CANNOT appear. Accusing them = 54 guaranteed lies.
  Caught this false positive in my own report before shipping it.

version skew line — the census is written by the INSTALLED build across
  ALL projects; the closure comes from THIS tree. Printed, so NEVER is read
  in context instead of as a verdict.

ADVISORY, exits 0 — "0 fires" is a strong signal, never proof. A rare
  event (WorktreeRemove) looks identical to a broken guard from here.
  Read the guard. Never auto-delete. --strict is opt-in.

7 Regression guard (+3 cases, 28/28 green)

8a  stdin-only session_id  → MUST record   (the bug itself)
8b  env-var fallback       → still works   (no regression)
8c  no session anywhere    → still skips   (no junk records)

note: first draft of 8c asserted on census LINE COUNT and flaked — the
census is a shared global file and live sessions append during the test.
Re-anchored on the per-session events.jsonl this run owns. A race in the
test, not a bug in the code — but it would have flaked in CI forever.
Verified: 289 vitest files / 7,162 pass · dispatcher 28/28 · validate-registry PASS (0 dead) · run-hook.mjs hot path unchanged for the reporter; the one-line tracking fix is the only runtime edit. Lineage: #959 → #2886 → the closure gate (#2887) → this.
